title: API foundation: auth + JSON error helpers + health route

task.description: Add shared API utilities for enforcing authenticated session and emitting SPEC-compliant error JSON. Include a small authenticated-only health route to manually verify 401 behavior when logged out and 200 when logged in.
acceptance_criteria: requireAuthUser(request) returns an object containing userId for authenticated requests; unauthenticated requests receive status 401 with body.error.code as a non-empty string.
jsonError(status, code, message, fields?) returns JSON matching {error:{code,message}} and includes fields only when provided.
GET /api/_health-auth returns 401 when logged out and 200 with {ok:true} when logged in.

definition_of_done: All API errors follow the documented error shape.
Auth enforcement is server-side and reusable across routes.
